text_block_list.text:
On our way back from a day out, Seiun Sky and I
run into Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hoo boy. There she goes again, sighing away like
she's getting paid for it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Yeah, she's been acting a little out of it
lately.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You go on ahead. I'll catch up!

Seiun Sky sprints off. I chase after her out of
concern and soon find her standing in front of a
grocer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, these carrots look good. ♪ The color, the
shine... They're downright perfect.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's a darn waste you're not advertising these
veggies. I think you could sell a truckload of 'em!

text_block_list.name: Vegetable Seller
text_block_list.text:
Well, now! Someone's got a real eye for carrots! I
might just give that a shot!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...There we go. Now I just have to wait for Spe to
walk this way.

text_block_list.name: Vegetable Seller
text_block_list.text: Hello there, young lady! Might I interest you in a perfect carrot?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Vegetable Seller
text_block_list.text:
Take a look at the color, the shine! And they're
chock-full of nutrients! You know what, I'll even
give you one on the house!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...No, I'm okay. Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Are you kidding me?! She passed on a carrot?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I see... I'm gonna have to break out the big tackle
for this one!

Next, Seiun Sky heads to a cafe, buys three slices
of cake, and places them on a table.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Sei?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Spe! Nice timing! I ordered waaay too much
cake.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if you wouldn't mind doing me a solid
and taking a slice?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Nnnngh, I'm sorry, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wha? Spe?! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: N-no way... This is cake we're talking about here...

Seiun Sky stands frozen in shock. Without
thinking, I blurt something out.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wagh?! Trainer?! How long have you been there?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Never mind, I gotta—wait, there's no point
chasing after her.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I mean, even if I chased her down, what would I
do then? She just passed right over her favorite
food.
choice_data_list:
But you've gone to all this trouble because you
can't turn a blind eye, right?

But you've gone to all this trouble because you
can't turn a blind eye, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Ooh Trainer, you're one crafty devil.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... All right, all right, I'll get chasing!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Wait up, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What? Sei?! Y-you followed me all the way here?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uh, well... You know, I, uh, how do you say...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm really sorry I ran off back there!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The truth is... I'm on a super strict diet right now!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, gotcha. A diet... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So that's why you've been all listless lately?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah! And I've been tempted so many times
today. It's been a nightmare!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heh, ahahaha! So that's it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sheesh... Well I'll be.
choice_data_list:
So the source of the temptation was none other
than...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yep, yep. I guess Spe's gotta be Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Of course! Who else could I be?

I listen to their spirited conversation as the three
of us make our way back to campus.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, keep quiet. Nobody likes a snitch.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What is it? Tell me, tell me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, my lips are sealed.
After that, Seiun Sky smiles the whole way home.
